title: Novio a la vista
writer: Edgar Neville, José Luis Colina, Juan Antonio Bardem
actors: Josette Arno, Jorge Vico, Julia Caba Alba
plot: At the beginning of the 20th century a young girl accompanied by her parents goes to a beach to find a suitable fiancé. Her mother would rather see her marry an older engineer, but the girl falls in love with Enrique, a student of...
